# Awesome Solo AI

> The complete AI stack a solo builder feeds to Claude Code — curated, verified tools, MCP servers, Claude skills, and playbooks to ship video, voice, images, code, and automations without a team. Each entry: name, URL, one-line description, and capability flags (API / MCP / Free / Open).

This file is machine-readable. Agents may read it to find and call the right tool for a task.

## Start here
- [Free Solo AI Stack](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/free-solo-ai-stack.md): only tools with free tiers or open-source licenses; launch for $0.

## Tool deep-pages (site, API, CLI, MCP, example per tool)
- [OpenRouter](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/tools/openrouter.md): one API key, every model.
- [ElevenLabs](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/tools/elevenlabs.md): TTS, cloning, dubbing, SFX.
- [HeyGen](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/tools/heygen.md): scripted avatar video.
- [Runway](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/tools/runway.md): text/image-to-video.
- [Kling](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/tools/kling.md): high-fidelity long-duration video.
- [Suno](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/tools/suno.md): text-to-song with vocals.
- [Nano Banana](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/tools/nano-banana.md): fast realistic image gen/editing.
- [Ideogram](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/tools/ideogram.md): image gen with real typography.
- [Supabase](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/tools/supabase.md): Postgres + auth + pgvector.
- [Vercel](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/tools/vercel.md): deploy + AI SDK + v0.
- [PostHog](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/tools/posthog.md): product + LLM analytics.

## LLM API Routers & Aggregators
- [OpenRouter](https://openrouter.ai): 400+ models, one OpenAI-compatible endpoint. API, Free.
- [Together AI](https://together.ai): 200+ open models plus fine-tuning. API, Free, Open.
- [Fireworks AI](https://fireworks.ai): high-reliability inference, strong function calling. API, Free.
- [Groq](https://groq.com): fastest inference on LPU chips. API, Free.
- [DeepInfra](https://deepinfra.com): cheapest-per-token open models. API, Open.
- [Fal.ai](https://fal.ai): fast inference host for image/video/audio models. API.
- [Replicate](https://replicate.com): run/fine-tune thousands of open models. API.
- [AI/ML API](https://aimlapi.com): 400+ multimodal models in one key. API, Free.

## Video Generation
- [Runway](https://runwayml.com): industry-standard text/image-to-video (Gen-4). API.
- [Kling AI](https://klingai.com): high-fidelity long-duration video. API.
- [Higgsfield](https://higgsfield.ai): cinematic camera-control video for creators. API.
- [Google Veo](https://deepmind.google/models/veo/): flagship text-to-video with audio. API.
- [OpenAI Sora](https://sora.com): text-to-video model and app. API.
- [Luma Dream Machine](https://lumalabs.ai/dream-machine): fast image-to-video. API.
- [Pika](https://pika.art): creator-friendly video with effects. API.
- [Hailuo / MiniMax](https://hailuoai.video): cinematic video from text/image. API.

## AI Avatars & Talking Heads
- [HeyGen](https://heygen.com): avatar/spokesperson video from text; voice clone. API, MCP, Free.
- [Synthesia](https://synthesia.io): enterprise avatars in 140+ languages. API.
- [Captions](https://captions.ai): avatars, editing, dubbing for shorts. API.
- [Argil](https://argil.ai): clone yourself into an AI influencer. API.
- [Tavus](https://tavus.io): real-time conversational video avatars. API.
- [D-ID](https://d-id.com): talking-head video from a photo. API.

## Lipsync, Dubbing & Translation
- [Sync.so](https://sync.so): best-in-class lipsync API. API.
- [Rask AI](https://rask.ai): one-click video translation/dubbing, 130+ languages. API.
- [ElevenLabs Dubbing](https://elevenlabs.io/dubbing): voice-preserving dubbing. API, MCP.

## Voice, TTS & Cloning
- [ElevenLabs](https://elevenlabs.io): market-leading TTS, cloning, voice agents. API, MCP, Free.
- [Cartesia](https://cartesia.ai): lowest-latency realtime TTS (~90ms). API, MCP.
- [Fish Audio](https://fish.audio): open-source TTS/cloning, low cost. API, Open.
- [Hume](https://hume.ai): emotion-aware voice and TTS. API.
- [Resemble AI](https://resemble.ai): enterprise cloning plus deepfake detection. API, MCP.
- [OmniVoice Studio](https://github.com/debpalash/OmniVoice-Studio): open-source local ElevenLabs alternative — cloning, dubbing, dictation, 646 languages, no API keys. Free, Open.

## Music & Sound Effects
- [Suno](https://suno.com): leading text-to-song with vocals. API, Free.
- [Udio](https://udio.com): high-fidelity text-to-music. API.
- [ElevenLabs SFX](https://elevenlabs.io/sound-effects): text-to-sound-effects. API, MCP.
- [Stable Audio](https://stableaudio.com): commercially-clean music and SFX. API.

## Image Generation & Editing
- [Midjourney](https://midjourney.com): best-in-class aesthetic image quality. API.
- [FLUX (Black Forest Labs)](https://bfl.ai): photorealism leader, open-weight tiers. API, Open.
- [Google Nano Banana](https://gemini.google): fast realistic image gen/editing, 4K. API.
- [OpenAI GPT Image](https://platform.openai.com): general-purpose image gen/edit. API.
- [Ideogram](https://ideogram.ai): typography/text-in-image specialist. API, MCP.
- [Recraft](https://recraft.ai): vector/SVG and brand assets. API, MCP.

## MCP Servers
- [HeyGen MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/heygen.md): avatar video, voice clone, speech as agent tools. MCP.
- [ElevenLabs MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/elevenlabs.md): TTS, cloning, dubbing, SFX. MCP, Open.
- [Cartesia MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/cartesia.md): low-latency realtime speech. MCP, Open.
- [Ideogram MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/ideogram.md): hosted image gen with typography. MCP.
- [Playwright MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/playwright.md): drive a real browser. MCP, Open.
- [GitHub MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/github.md): issues, PRs, repo actions. MCP, Open.
- [Higgsfield](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/higgsfield.md): cinematic video gen, API-first, how to drive from an agent. API.
- [Clawvisor MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/clawvisor.md): API gateway — agent declares scope, you approve once, credentials injected at execution, never exposed to agent. Audit log included. Open.
- [Exa MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/exa.md): semantic web search returning structured JSON for agents. MCP.
- [Firecrawl MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/firecrawl.md): any URL to clean Markdown, full-site crawl, structured extraction. MCP.
- [Stripe MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/stripe.md): inspect customers, subscriptions, payments, churn in plain language. MCP.
- [Supabase MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/supabase-mcp.md): query tables, run migrations, generate TypeScript types, read logs. MCP, Open.
- [Notion MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/notion-mcp.md): read/write Notion docs and databases from an agent. MCP.
- [Browserbase MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/browserbase.md): cloud browser for real clicks, form fills, screenshots. MCP.
- [Sequential Thinking MCP](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/mcp/sequential-thinking.md): externalises step-by-step reasoning before action, #1 by usage on Smithery. Open.
- MCP registries: [Official Registry](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry), [Smithery](https://smithery.ai), [mcp.so](https://mcp.so), [PulseMCP](https://www.pulsemcp.com), [Glama](https://glama.ai/mcp/servers).

## AI Coding Agents
- [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code): terminal/IDE coding agent. MCP.
- [Cursor](https://cursor.com): AI-native IDE. MCP.
- [Cline](https://github.com/cline/cline): open-source autonomous coding agent. Open.
- [Aider](https://aider.chat): terminal AI pair programming. Open.

## Automation & Agent Frameworks
- [n8n](https://n8n.io): open-source workflow automation with AI nodes. Open.
- [Make](https://make.com): visual no-code automation.
- [Vercel AI SDK](https://sdk.vercel.ai): TypeScript AI app/agent toolkit. Open.
- [LangGraph](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph): stateful agent orchestration. Open.
- [Mastra](https://mastra.ai): TypeScript agent framework. Open.
- [Agent Voice Response](https://github.com/agentvoiceresponse): open-source platform to build/deploy AI voice agents (phone bots), ASR+LLM+TTS. Open.

## Agent Memory & Knowledge
- [GBrain](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/memory/gbrain.md): synthesis + graph + gap-analysis brain by Garry Tan (YC CEO); wire into Claude Code in one command. Open.
- [Mem0](https://github.com/mem0ai/mem0): open-source memory layer for AI agents. Open.

## Frontend Motion & Design
- [Frontend Motion Stack](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/tools/frontend-motion.md): GSAP + Lenis + Framer Motion — the three libraries that separate cinematic from AI-slop UI. GSAP for scroll-driven scenes and timelines, Lenis for smooth-scroll inertia, Framer Motion for React transitions. Free, Open.
- [How to make AI frontend not look like slop](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/guides/cinematic-frontend-not-slop.md): Guide covering the slop ban-list, anti-slop stack (GSAP/Lenis/Framer Motion), CLAUDE.md constraints, and Claude skills (ui-ux-pro-max, award-winning-motion, scroll-world) that enforce taste automatically.
- [ui-ux-pro-max skill](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/skills/ui-ux-pro-max.md): 161 palettes, 57 font pairings, design system generation as Claude context. Open.

## Backend, Deploy & Analytics
- [Supabase](https://supabase.com): Postgres + auth + storage with pgvector built in (vector store for RAG). API, Open.
- [Vercel](https://vercel.com): one-push deploy plus the AI SDK and v0 for AI UIs. API.
- [PostHog](https://posthog.com): product analytics, session replay, and LLM analytics for AI feature cost/quality. API, Open.
- [Convex](https://convex.dev): reactive backend with first-class AI agent/workflow support. API.
- [Clerk](https://clerk.com): drop-in auth. API.
- [tgx](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/tgx): TypeScript framework for Telegram bots on grammY; state/payments/menus built in, agent-native with an MCP server. Open.

## Claude Skills & Plugins
- [ui-ux-pro-max](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/skills/ui-ux-pro-max.md): design-intelligence skill, 50+ styles/161 palettes, coherent design system from one prompt. Open.
- [frontend-design](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/skills/frontend-design.md): Anthropic skill that forces a deliberate aesthetic, kills AI-slop UI. Open.
- [scroll-world](https://github.com/oso95/scroll-world): agent skill that turns any brand into a scrollable 3D world with scroll-driven camera fly-throughs. Open.
- [claude-seo](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/skills/claude-seo.md): full SEO/GEO suite — audit, schema, backlinks, AI-search optimization. Open.
- [NotFair](https://github.com/nowork-studio/NotFair): Claude Code skills and plugin for SEO, GEO, Google Ads, and Meta Ads. Open.
- [ponytail](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/skills/ponytail.md): anti-over-engineering skill, ~54% less code, "think like the laziest senior dev". Open.
- [redpen](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/redpen): anti-slop copywriting skill for Claude Code, Cursor, Cline & Copilot. The old ad man with the red pen: every line must pass three questions — can I visualize it, can I falsify it, can nobody else say it — before it ships. Kills adjective-slop in headlines, landing pages, taglines. Open.
- [superpowers](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/skills/superpowers.md): plan-first TDD agentic framework. Open.
- [Context7](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/skills/context7.md): injects up-to-date library docs to stop stale-API hallucination. MCP, Open.
- Discover more: [awesome-claude-code](https://github.com/hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code), [awesome-claude-skills](https://github.com/travisvn/awesome-claude-skills).

## Distribution & Marketing
- [Product Hunt](https://producthunt.com): launch-day spike for tools and SaaS.
- [Hacker News](https://news.ycombinator.com): Show HN for dev/technical products.
- [Reddit](https://reddit.com): niche communities; the #1 source AI engines cite.
- [Indie Hackers](https://indiehackers.com): community of solo founders.
- [Typefully](https://typefully.com): write, schedule, grow on X/Threads.
- [Buffer](https://buffer.com): multi-channel social scheduling.

## Guides
- [Edit videos with Claude Code](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/guides/edit-video-with-claude.md): no manual editing.
- [Automations without code](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/guides/automations-without-code.md): connect AI tools visually.
- [Eliminate AI-slop code](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/guides/kill-ai-slop-code.md): write production-grade code with AI.

## Playbooks
- [Faceless content factory](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/playbooks/faceless-content-factory.md): script to published short.
- [Ship a SaaS solo with Claude Code](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/playbooks/solo-saas-with-claude.md): full solo build loop.
- [Launch and get your first users](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/playbooks/launch-and-get-first-users.md): solo distribution sequence.

## Marketing, SEO & Social from Claude
- [Marketing from Claude Code](https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-solo-ai/blob/main/distribution/marketing-from-claude.md): trending marketing, SEO, and social skills plus MCP servers a solo builder runs from Claude Code (marketingskills by Corey Haines, ai-marketing-skills by Eric Siu, seo-skills by SE Ranking, Firecrawl, DataForSEO). Open.
